name: Japanese Stir Fry with Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 Boneless pork chop, cut into Julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the frozen vegetables into a 1-quart casserole dish; reserve the seasoning packet. Add the pork and oil to the vegetables. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap and microwave on high for three minutes.
2. Empty the contents of the seasoning packet into a small bowl. Stir in the cornstarch; blend in the sherry and soy sauce. Stir the mixture into the vegetables; recover. Microwave on high for three to four minutes, or until the vegetables are crisp-tender and the pork is no longer pink. Stir and serve over rice.
